introSection: Jungle Flying Squirrel (Chinese: 丛林飞鼠) was a steel jungle mouse roller coaster located at Country Garden Farm in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.
fullText:
Jungle Flying Squirrel (Chinese: 丛林飞鼠) was a steel jungle mouse roller coaster located at Country Garden Farm in Panyu, Guangzhou, Guangdong, China.

Blue track and yellow supports.

Each car sat one rider.
